ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(StageName) && NOT(Current_Stage_Sign_Off_Complete__c) && ( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Discovery') || ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Requirement Gathering') || ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Requirement Documentation') || ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'User Story Finalization') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please complete and approve the sign-off document for the current stage before advancing.
